name: @memoro/mobile-ui
description: React Native UI component library for memoro mobile apps

button.name: Button
button.description: Pressable button with variants, sizes, and icon support

text.name: Text
text.description: Typography component with predefined variants and weights

icon.name: Icon
icon.description: Cross-platform icon component (SF Symbols on iOS, Ionicons elsewhere)

container.name: Container
container.description: Safe area container with flexible padding and background

empty-state.name: EmptyState
empty-state.description: Empty state component for when there's no content

fab.name: FAB
fab.description: Floating Action Button with spring animation

tag.name: Tag
tag.description: Tag/Chip component for labels and categories

badge.name: Badge
badge.description: Notification badge for counts and status

card.name: Card
card.description: Container card with shadow and press interaction

select.name: Select
select.description: Horizontal scrollable selector for choosing between options

toggle-group.name: ToggleGroup
toggle-group.description: Segmented control for mutually exclusive options

header.name: Header
header.description: Navigation header with title, back button, and custom actions

tab-bar-icon.name: TabBarIcon
tab-bar-icon.description: Icon component optimized for tab bars
